query: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() RETURNS TABLE("InitiativeID" text, "Impacted BU" text, "Wave" text, "OverAll Impact" numeric) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t."InitiativeID", t."Impacted BU", t."Wave", t."OverAll Impact" FROM "TMC"."Change -  Tolerence" t ORDER BY t."InitiativeID"; END; $X$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() TO anon, authenticated; CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() RETURNS TABLE("Business units N-1" text, "Business units N-2" text, "Business units N-3" text, "CODE" text, "BU" text, "ID" text, "Level" text, "Emp. No." numeric) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $Y$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT b."Business units N-1", b."Business units N-2", b."Business units N-3", b."CODE", b."BU", b."ID", b."Level", b."Emp. No." FROM "TMC"."BUs Hierarchy" b ORDER BY b."ID"; END; $Y$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() TO anon, authenticated;
